description_long: This is a large, rectangular blue metal toolbox with a hinged lid that opens upwards, supported by two side struts. The exterior features a prominent Indian flag sticker on one side and a colorful image of the Hindu deity Ganesha on the front panel. The box has sturdy metal handles on both short ends for carrying, and a metal latch mechanism for securing the lid. The interior is a single, spacious compartment without visible trays or dividers, suitable for storing large tools or equipment. The surface shows signs of wear and minor scratches, indicating regular use in an urban or industrial environment.
description: A large blue metal toolbox with a hinged lid, metal handles, and visible Indian flag and Ganesha stickers. The box is spacious inside and shows signs of use.
description_view_0: Side view showing the open lid, interior compartment, and a metal handle on the near end.
description_view_1: Front view with the lid open, displaying the Ganesha sticker and the full width of the interior.
description_view_2: Opposite side view with the open lid and a metal handle, mirroring view 0.
description_view_3: Rear view with the lid closed, prominently featuring the Indian flag sticker.
attribute_handle_type: Rectangular, fixed metal handles on each short end, likely steel with a simple ergonomic grip.
attribute_latch_mechanism: Single metal clasp latch on the front, padlock-compatible, no visible keyhole or combination lock.
attribute_compartment_configuration: Single large internal compartment with no visible trays, bins, or dividers; open and unobstructed.
attribute_external_labeling: Indian flag sticker on the rear panel
Ganesha sticker on the front panel
